creator: bileslav@gmail.com
text:
>I came across this more than half a year ago
I meant the first time. That is, this is still happening.

Now I'm trying to get at least one crash under X11. Using sway, it can happen almost immediately after opening a file in GIMP, but also it may not happen at all.

I have a vague suspicion that the crash may only be triggered with certain files. There were definitely a few crashes with this one:

https://images.hdqwalls.com/wallpapers/polygon-lake-sunset-minimalist-hl.jpg
